# Pull Request

## Scope

- Milestone:
- Summary:
- What is deliberately out of scope:

## Validation

- [ ] Python checks considered or run
- [ ] R checks considered or run
- [ ] Repository validation considered or run
- [ ] Documentation updated or not required

## Governance

- [ ] No real patient, NHS, HMRC, or other sensitive data added
- [ ] No credentials or realistic secrets added
- [ ] Generated artefacts disclosed
- [ ] Denodo and SAS Viya claims labelled honestly
- [ ] No future milestone functionality implemented early

## Evidence

List commands, outputs, screenshots, or documents used for review. Do not include fabricated commercial-tool evidence.
